_note: REAL 1,000-row sample from the Japan Ramen Active Master (62,176 active). IDs are public masks (internal keys withheld). name_en/pref_en/city_en let you query fully in English. keito is the coarse public enum (tonkotsu/miso/shoyu/shio/tsukemen/spicy/other). payment_qr_accepted / stationless are enriched in the live API only. No canary records.
_attribution: Store facts observed from public web ramen listings; licensing-verified records from Japanese municipality open data (© municipality open data, CC BY). Derived values (keito, romanization, station distance) © gachi-tokusuru.com.
